headline: Valero Stock Surges 88.1% in a Year: Should You Stay Invested?
summary: VLO's Gulf Coast refining edge, flexible feedstock sourcing and clean-fuel growth make the stock worth watching despite its premium valuation.

headline: Marathon Petroleum: Focus On Russia, Not Just Iran
summary: Marathon Petroleum stock stays a top "Buy" as Russia refining outages keep crack spreads high, driving cash flow and buybacks. Click for more on MPC stock.
